root.name: Slide 5 Chart Resizing and Prominence
root.description: Evaluates whether the main chart on slide 5 has been resized to be larger and more prominent, and that other images do not unnecessarily crowd it.

children.name: Main Chart Resized Larger
children.description: Checks that the main chart on slide 5 has been resized to be significantly larger than before.

children.name: No Extraneous Changes to Other Slides
children.description: Verify that only slide 5 has been modified, and no other slides have been added or removed.

children.name: Other Images Do Not Crowd Chart
children.description: Checks that other images on slide 5 do not overlap with or crowd the main chart after resizing, maintaining clarity and focus.

metadata.task: Slide 5: Resize the images to make the main chart larger and more prominent on the slide
